news.title: Why Andrej Karpathy Chose Anthropic Over OpenAI
news.description: Andrej Karpathy, a prominent figure in artificial intelligence, has recently joined Anthropic, a company known for its focus on ethical AI development and safety. This move signals a shift in Karpathy’s career toward addressing the societal implications of AI…

news.title: Could anything but profit steer AI? The OpenAI trial offered clues but no verdict
news.description: The trial pitting Elon Musk against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman made clear the two billionaires agreed on one thing: building artificial intelligence would require significant resources — and enormous amounts of money

news.title: Overcoming Situational Depression Via Generative AI Including Tapping Into ChatGPT
news.description: Situational depression arises when an event or circumstance triggers you into a bout of depression. AI can help to overcome this. An AI Insider scoop.

news.title: Zoom reaps $1 billion from Anthropic investment
